items.visual_description: A long-sleeved button-up shirt in a light beige color with a tonal vertical pinstripe pattern. The shirt has a relaxed fit, a camp collar, and a button-front closure with small, matching beige buttons. There is a single patch pocket on the left side of the chest. The fabric appears lightweight with a subtle texture.

overall_description: This image displays a single, elegant long-sleeved shirt in a neutral beige hue. It has a pajama-style design with a relaxed fit, a camp collar, and a subtle tonal pinstripe pattern, creating a look of sophisticated comfort.
